---
name: 🌍 Translation Request
about: Request or contribute translations for Indian languages

labels: translation, i18n

---

## 🌍 Language
Which language(s) does this involve?

- [ ] Hindi 🇮🇳
- [ ] Punjabi 🇮🇳
- [ ] Tamil 🇮🇳
- [ ] Telugu 🇮🇳
- [ ] Bengali 🇮🇳
- [ ] Marathi 🇮🇳
- [ ] Gujarati 🇮🇳
- [ ] Kannada 🇮🇳
- [ ] Malayalam 🇮🇳
- [ ] Odia 🇮🇳
- [ ] Other: ___

## 📋 Type
- [ ] 🆕 New translation for existing strings
- [ ] 🐛 Fix incorrect translation
- [ ] ➕ Add new strings that need translation

## 📝 Details
Describe what needs to be translated or fixed.

## 🧑‍🌾 Context
Any farming-specific terminology or regional dialects to consider?
